title: Reorder columns in table view in dashboard
excerpt: It seems that changing the order of columns in the table widget is not supported at this time. This means that the order shown in the main table is the order in which the table widget on the dashboard is the order shown …

posts.author: MaxineStam (Maxine Stam)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems that changing the order of columns in the table widget is not supported at this time. This means that the order shown in the main table is the order in which the table widget on the dashboard is the order shown automatically. It would be amazing to change this order, just like in an item card for example.
